title: YouTubers Beni Marmol and Pato Perrotta arrested after trying to sneak into FIFA World Cup match
summary_full: Two popular YouTubers, Beni Marmol and Pato Perrotta, were arrested in Miami for allegedly attempting to enter a FIFA World Cup match using expired media passes. Authorities apprehended them after they reportedly bypassed multiple security checkpoints, aiming to live stream the Portugal vs. Colombia game. While released on bail, they face charges of interference with a sporting event and are barred from stadium vicinity during the ongoing legal proceedings.
